name: Pork with Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred pork and cabbage.
2. Heat oil in a wok until it reaches the smoking point. Brown the pork for about 3 minutes. Add the cabbage, salt, and soy sauce. Stir everything well.
3. Add half a cup of water, cover the wok, and cook all ingredients for 8-10 minutes, lifting the lid occasionally to stir the mixture.
